query: SELECT wt.id, wt.walletId, u.username, wt.type, wt.amount, wt.description, wt.createdAt FROM wallet_transactions wt LEFT JOIN wallets w ON w.id = wt.walletId LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = w.userId ORDER BY wt.createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
